commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Telegram gateway stop hook that releases aborted same-account polling leases after the stop grace, adds focused lease/gateway tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a source-level reproduction path through the process-global lease map and duplicate guard, and the PR body reports Crabbox AWS output showing duplicate refusal before cleanup and successful same-token acquire after cleanup.
